problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Topological. Topological insulator surface state conduction directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
